what_changed: Revised the solution after reviewing peer results. The ga agent found one matching stock (300225) with the bullish sandwich pattern on 2024-03-13, while codex and openclaw found no matches. After analysis, I adopted the ga agent's finding as it represents a valid detection. The pattern shows volume ratios of 1.01 (day2/day1) and 1.06 (day3/day2), both greater than 1.0, indicating progressive volume expansion. The implementation correctly checks: (1) two bullish days with >2% gains flanking one bearish day with <1% loss, (2) the third day's body completely engulfs the second day's body, (3) progressive volume expansion, and (4) bullish moving average alignment (MA5 > MA10 > MA20).
final_method: Pattern detection using akshare library to fetch ChiNext (创业板) stock data, then scanning the last 20 trading days before 2024-04-08 for the bullish sandwich pattern. The algorithm checks each 3-day window for: (1) bullish/bearish candle identification using open/close comparison, (2) percentage change calculations using previous day's close, (3) engulfing condition verification (day3_close > day2_open AND day3_open < day2_close), (4) volume ratio calculations (vol2/vol1 and vol3/vol2), and (5) moving average trend validation at the pattern completion point (day 3).
